font-weight.$description: Instrument Serif ships only 400 — synthesized bold smears the high-contrast face.

line-height.$description: Solid display leading for the page title.

spacing-after.$description: Breathing room between the page title and its lede.

font-family.$description: Font size for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-size.$description: Font size for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

letter-spacing.$description: Tracking for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

measure.$description: Maximum width for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-before.$description: Amount of margin inline start for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

color.$description: Color of H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.$description: Text transform for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
